description: A cool-toned six-stone cairn status tool with no face, used as a quiet workspace state indicator.

patient waiting loop with small motion

pet_notes: A six-stone cairn trail-marker stacked 3+2+1, same overall silhouette as the approved cairn reference, but it is a tool/status indicator, not a character. No eyes, no mouth, no brows, no face, no cute expression. Strict cool palette only: slate blue #2C3E50, dark stone grey #374151, cool grey #4B5563, blue-grey #64748B, cool slate #475569, ice grey-white #CBD5E1, frost white #F1F5F9. No warm colors, no browns. All six stones have different irregular polygonal silhouettes, slight hand-stacked rotations, compact stone marker shape. Bottom layer 3 stones foundation, middle 2 stones transition, top 1 stone smallest and brightest with only a crack and highlight.
style_notes: Codex digital pet sprite style but tool-like: compact pixel-art-adjacent status marker, thick dark 1-2 px outlines, stepped pixel edges, flat cel shading, limited cool palette, no face, no detached effects, no aura, no sparkles, no symbols, no UI, no text. Motion should feel like quiet state indication rather than personality acting.
house_style: Codex digital pet sprite style: pixel-art-adjacent low-resolution mascot sprite, compact chibi proportions, chunky whole-body silhouette, thick dark 1-2 px outline, visible stepped/pixel edges, limited palette, flat cel shading with at most one small highlight and one shadow step, simple readable face, tiny limbs, and no detail that disappears at 192x208. Avoid polished illustration, painterly rendering, anime key art, 3D render, vector app-icon polish, glossy lighting, soft gradients, realistic fur or material texture, anti-aliased high-detail edges, and complex tiny accessories.
